plugins.name: code-architecture
plugins.description: Plan, document, and review code architecture for software projects. Collaborative workflow with pattern choices, restructuring support, output scaling, simplicity checks, scope boundaries, and AI-ready implementation specs. Deep reference patterns for Node.js/Express, Unity (C#), and C++/CMake — works for any stack.
